description: A community impact initiative targeting personal development and health awareness. Applying for the Millennium Fellowship with SDG 3 focus, targeting 100 lives across 6 sessions.
Applied as a Millennium Fellow under UNAI Principle 2 and SDG 3, representing The Kaizen Project as a vehicle for community health and personal development impact.
Representing Cowrywise on campus, promoting financial literacy and smart savings habits among students at the University of Lagos.
Managing communications and public relations for the Igbo Students Union at UNILAG. Also edits and produces the union's monthly podcast.
Active member of PalDevs, a developer community focused on building, learning, and growing together as engineers.
